payload.claim_text: The underrepresentation for females... occurred in the following EEO categories: Professional – Whites, Administrative Support – Whites, Skilled Craft – Hispanics and Whites
payload.subject: MTA LIRR

payload.claim_text: Minority Males: Officials and Administrators – Hispanics
payload.subject: MTA LIRR

tool_args.label: MTA Veterans ERG Memorial Day Observance

payload.description: MTA Veterans Employee Resource Group held a noontime Memorial Day Observance on May 17th at 2 Broadway to remember those who paid the ultimate sacrifice. The guest speaker was Patrick Warren, MTA Chief Security Officer and Retired Army Colonel.

payload.title: MTA Chief Security Officer and Retired Army Colonel

payload.claim_text: When vacancies occur for EEO job categories, MTA LIRR's action strategy to address areas of underutilization will include: Identifying specific job groups/job titles within the underutilized category that present an opportunity for targeted recruitment; Forecasting future opportunities for underutilized job groups/titles, in communication with hiring managers, and raising awareness of need to make extra efforts to achieve representation of targeted groups in the candidate pools; Engaging with potential outreach sources relevant to the underutilized groups, such as hosting career fairs to attract qualified candidates into the pipeline for non-traditional technical positions; Creating unique approaches to attract, promote and retain the specific job group/job title.
payload.subject: MTA LIRR

payload.claim_text: MTA LIRR will create targeted strategies and initiatives for the following underutilization job groups: Officials & Administrators, Professionals, Administrative Support, and Skilled Craft.
payload.subject: MTA LIRR

tool_args.label: Diversity and Civil Rights prepared the report

payload.description: Employee Resource Groups help foster a diverse and inclusive workplace

tool_args.label: Patrick Warren spoke at Memorial Day event

payload.description: Workforce, new hires, separations, and EEO complaint metrics are about MTA LIRR
